<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by vue-docgen-cli — do not edit. Source: src/components/CnDetailGrid/CnDetailGrid.vue -->

### Props

| Name               | Type      | Required | Default                                               | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| ------------------ | --------- | -------- | ----------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `items`            | `union`   |          | `[]`                                                  | Array of detail items to render. An item may carry `referenceType: '<integration-id>'` (AD-18) to render the integration's single-entity widget for its value instead of a plain string; `value` then acts as the widget's input value. |
| `referenceContext` | `union`   |          | `null`                                                | Object context forwarded to integration single-entity widgets rendered for items that declare a `referenceType` — an object `{ register, schema, objectId }`. Optional.                                                                 |
| `layout`           | `string`  |          | `'grid'`                                              | Layout mode. - 'grid': Responsive card grid, label stacked above value - 'horizontal': Vertical list of rows, label on left, value on right                                                                                             |
| `columns`          | `number`  |          | `0`                                                   | Number of fixed grid columns. Set to 0 (default) for responsive auto-fit. Only applies to layout="grid".                                                                                                                                |
| `minItemWidth`     | `number`  |          | `250`                                                 | Minimum width (px) for auto-fit grid items. Only applies when columns is 0 and layout is 'grid'.                                                                                                                                        |
| `labelWidth`       | `number`  |          | `150`                                                 | Minimum width (px) for labels in horizontal mode.                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `accent`           | `boolean` |          | `true`                                                | Whether to show the left accent border on items.                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `emptyLabel`       | `string`  |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'No details available')` | Text shown when the items array is empty.                                                                                                                                                                                               |

### Slots

| Name                      | Bindings                | Description |
| ------------------------- | ----------------------- | ----------- |
| `empty`                   | —                       |             |
| `'label-' + index`        | `name`, `item`, `index` |             |
| `'item-' + index`         | `name`, `item`, `index` |             |
| `'item-actions-' + index` | `name`, `item`, `index` |             |
| `default`                 | —                       |             |
